subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and we would love to continue the conversation.

We have the following availability next week for a 30-minute call:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know your preferred date and time within those windows, and we will set up the meeting.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not able to share internal personnel contact information. I would recommend checking our public website for available contact options. Alternatively, once our introductory meeting is confirmed, we can coordinate to ensure the appropriate senior stakeholders are involved in any follow-up discussions.

Thanks again for following up, and we look forward to meeting!

Best regards
